narrative:
Trotwood City has 15,414 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 40.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 34.9 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +9.1% D−R vs +48.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
